potential_missing.source_sentence: The ultimate aim of this system is to suggest the videos to the users based on the factors such as trending, similar views of the people and their search results.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall collect user history or activities.
The system shall process the collected data.
The system shall create a dataset for suggesting videos.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The ultimate aim of this system is to suggest the videos to the users based on the factors such as trending, similar views of the people and their search results.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall provide video suggestions based on user behavior and preferences.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The Video Suggestion System will be found helpful in place of searching a video based on the preference and taste of the user
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow users to search for videos based on their preferences and tastes.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall load suggested videos based on user preference and taste.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is not supported by the source text, which only mentions that the system will be helpful in place of searching a video.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall collect user history or activities.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous because it does not specify what type of data should be collected (e.g. browsing history, search queries, etc.).
